hero.title: Let Us Observe Your Space.
hero.description: We take on a limited number of commissions each year. Reach out to discuss your project, and we will tell you honestly if we are the right studio to steward it.

stats.label: Commission Cap
stats.text: A strict limit ensures dedicated attention to each project.

stats.label: Response Time
stats.text: Every inquiry is reviewed directly by our lead designers.

stats.label: Global Presence
stats.text: Accepting selected commissions across Europe and beyond.

general.title: General Inquiries
general.excerpt: For all project-related questions, collaboration requests, or to schedule an initial consultation.

press.title: Press & Media
press.excerpt: For publication features, high-resolution image requests, and interviews with Elena Conti.

careers.title: Careers
careers.excerpt: We are always looking for quiet talent. Send your portfolio (PDF, max 10MB) for consideration.
